eoscRelatedServices.description: PIDs of services related to this training resource

keywords.description: The keyword(s) or tag(s) used to describe the resource.

accessRights.description: The access status of a resource (open, restricted, paid).

versionDate.description: The date of the latest version of the training resource

targetGroups.description: The principal users(s) for which the learning resource was designed.

learningResourceTypes.description: The predominant type or kind that characterizes the learning resource.

learningOutcomes.description: The descriptions of what knowledge, skills or abilities students should acquire on completion of the resource.

items.description: Target skill level in the topic being taught.

contentResourceTypes.description: The predominant content type of the learning resource (video, game, diagram, slides, etc.).

qualifications.description: Identification of certification, accreditation or badge obtained with course or learning resource.

items.description: Approximate or typical time it takes to work with or through the learning resource for the typical intended target audience.

languages.description: The language in which the resource was originally published or made available.

creators.description: The main individuals involved in producing the training resource, in priority order
